en: Italy Construction Worksite Safety Credit Certification (Patente a Crediti Certificato)

The Patente a Crediti ("Credit License") is a mandatory certification for companies and self-employed individuals operating on temporary or mobile construction sites in Italy. It ensures compliance with workplace safety regulations and assigns a points-based score reflecting adherence to legal standards.

For detailed information, please refer to the official guidelines from the Italian Ministry of Labour and Social Policies:

Step by step guide to request certificate:
https://www.certifico.com/component/attachments/download/41341   


National Labor Inspectorate (INL): 
https://servizi.ispettorato.gov.it/
